title: Foodstore Known Issues & Resolutions
description: Registry of known errors, their causes, and how to fix them

entries.title: INVALID_ANNOTATION from @microsoft/signalr
entries.description: Rolldown (Vite 8) cannot interpret /*#__PURE__*/ annotations in @microsoft/signalr because they're placed before function declarations instead of call expressions.
entries.impact: Cosmetic warning only. Build succeeds. No runtime impact.
entries.resolution: Cannot fix — it's in node_modules. Suppressed by removing rollupOptions.onwarn (which only worked for Rollup, not Rolldown). Monitor upstream @microsoft/signalr releases for a fix.

entries.title: @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any — 70+ occurrences
entries.description: Many API client functions, state stores, and component props use `any` instead of proper TypeScript types.
entries.impact: Lint warnings only. Does not fail build (configured as 'warn'). No runtime impact.
entries.resolution: Long-term: replace each `any` with proper interface. Priority: API responses → component props → internal state.

entries.title: svelte/no-navigation-without-resolve — 15 occurrences
entries.description: `goto()` calls in SvelteKit should use `await resolve()` first to ensure navigation is complete before proceeding.
entries.impact: No runtime impact. Navigation still works. Could cause race conditions in edge cases.
entries.resolution: Add `const resolve = navigationEnd(); await resolve;` or use `goto(..., { invalidateAll: true })` pattern.

entries.title: svelte/prefer-svelte-reactivity — 20 occurrences
entries.file: analytics.svelte.ts, blog.svelte.ts, dashboard.svelte.ts, categories, combos, employees, menu, discounts, media, rich text editor
entries.description: Built-in `Date`, `Map`, `Set`, `URL` instances used in `.svelte.ts` files. Use `SvelteDate`, `SvelteMap`, `SvelteSet`, `SvelteURL` from `svelte/reactivity` instead for proper Svelte 5 reactivity.
entries.impact: Reactively assigned built-in classes may not trigger UI updates correctly when mutated.
entries.resolution: Import from `svelte/reactivity`: `import { SvelteMap, SvelteSet, SvelteDate, SvelteURL } from 'svelte/reactivity'` and replace usage.

entries.title: @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars — 15 occurrences
entries.description: Variables imported or declared but never used (e.g., `goto`, `onMount`, `customerAPI`, `posAPI`, `data`, `err`, `e`).
entries.impact: Dead code. No runtime impact but reduces clarity.
entries.resolution: Remove unused imports/vars or prefix with `_` to suppress (e.g., `_event`).

entries.title: @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-function-type
entries.description: Using `Function` type instead of a specific function signature for callback parameters.
entries.resolution: Define proper callback types: `type Callback = (...args: unknown[]) => void`

entries.title: preserve-caught-error
entries.description: Caught error is re-thrown without attaching `cause` property for better error diagnosis.
entries.impact: Lost error context in stack traces.
entries.resolution: Change `throw error` to `throw new Error('message', { cause: error })`

entries.title: svelte/no-unused-svelte-ignore — 2 occurrences
entries.description: `<!-- svelte-ignore ... -->` comment exists but the warning it was meant to suppress is no longer emitted.

entries.title: svelte/no-at-html-tags
entries.description: Uses `{@html ...}` which can lead to XSS if content is not sanitized.
entries.impact: Potential XSS vulnerability if blog content contains malicious scripts.
entries.resolution: Sanitize HTML before rendering with a library like DOMPurify, or avoid `{@html}` for user-generated content.

entries.title: svelte/require-each-key
entries.description: `{#each}` block is missing a `key` parameter, which can cause incorrect DOM updates.
entries.impact: Potential rendering issues when the list changes.
entries.resolution: Add a key: `{#each items as item (item.id)}`

entries.title: No unit tests
entries.description: The monorepo has no unit tests, integration tests, or end-to-end tests.
entries.impact: No test coverage. Changes must be manually verified.
entries.resolution: Add xUnit tests for .NET Usecase layer. Add Vitest tests for Svelte stores and API utilities. Add Playwright E2E tests for critical flows (login, POS order, payment).

entries.title: No Docker setup
entries.description: No Dockerfile or docker-compose.yml for containerized deployment.
entries.impact: Requires manual environment setup for each deployment.
entries.resolution: Create Dockerfile for each project and docker-compose.yml with SQL Server + API + Media Server.

entries.title: Default Media API key in appsettings.json
entries.description: The default API key `foodstore-media-api-key-2024` is committed to the repo.
entries.impact: Anyone with repo access knows the default key.
entries.resolution: Move API key to environment variable or user secrets. Rotate the key if already deployed.

entries.title: Large chunks > 500 kB
entries.description: Two chunks exceed 500 kB after minification (SignalR + combined node_modules).
entries.resolution: Use dynamic imports for heavy components or enable Rolldown code splitting via `build.rolldownOptions.output.codeSplitting`.

entries.title: No adapter configured for production
entries.impact: Resolved — adapter-node is configured and working.

entries.title: E-Invoice: no provider SDK packages installed
entries.description: Viettel and MISA e-invoice providers are implemented as placeholder/stub integrations. Real API calls require provider-specific SDK packages or direct SOAP/REST API clients.
entries.impact: E-invoice feature works end-to-end in test mode (mock data). Real invoice issuing requires provider SDKs and API keys.
entries.resolution: Install Viettel HDDT SDK and MISA e-invoice SDK when production providers are configured. Store provider API keys in environment variables (not appsettings.json).
